---
name: Feature Request｜功能需求
about: Suggest an idea for this project｜提交你的功能建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement｜问题背景

What problem are you trying to solve?｜你希望解决什么问题？

## Proposed Solution｜建议方案

Describe your preferred solution.｜请描述你倾向的解决方案。

## Alternatives Considered｜备选方案

Describe alternatives you considered.｜请说明你考虑过的其他方案。

## Additional Context｜补充信息

Screenshots, references, or related issues.｜可附截图、参考资料或相关 Issue。
